Bash(cd D:/github/copilot-ui && gh pr create --title "fix: use -p flag for claude CLI prompt argument" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Adds `-p` flag to the `claude` CLI command so the prompt is explicitly passed as a prompt argument, not parsed as a CLI option
- Fixes crash when user prompts start with a dash \(e.g. `-m ...`\) causing `error: unknown option` 
- Adds test to verify the `-p` flag is present in the constructed command

## Test plan
- [x] Existing engine tests pass \(8/8\)
- [ ] Manually create a claude session with a prompt starting with `-m` and verify it no longer errors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
